_meta.note: TPM-relevant subset only: enterprise deals with contractual dependencies on engineering programs. Full CRM export available from RevOps.
_meta.simulation_note: Simulated state as of 2026-04-13. Auth0 punt cascades into HORIZON deals. ATLAS SSO progress improves healthcare/financial deals. MERIDIAN M1 complete improves Thornbridge confidence.

summary.changeNote: HORIZON GA slip to Aug 31 increased mobile deal risk. Kestrel probability dropped 30 points — budget cycle exposure confirmed. Solaris evaluating Palantir. Partially offset by ATLAS SSO progress and MERIDIAN M1 completion.

accounts.name: Meridian Financial Group
accounts.notes: Largest active pipeline deal. Legal has 90-day clause — if SOC2 not in progress by May 1 2026, contract voids. SSO sandbox demo completed Apr 2 — Yvonne confirmed SSO works with Okta. SOC 2 still needs evidence package by May. Databricks still in evaluation.

accounts.name: Apex Health Systems
accounts.notes: CTO demo Apr 2 completed successfully — SSO working in sandbox. Marcus Webb confirmed POC can proceed. HIPAA documentation still being prepared by SHIELD team. Deal advancing to Proof of Concept stage.

accounts.name: Thornbridge Capital
accounts.notes: MERIDIAN M1 completed Apr 3 — v1 API support guaranteed through Sep. Migration tooling completing Apr 18. Sophie confirmed Thornbridge will use migration tooling (no dedicated support needed for this account). Renewal confidence increased.

accounts.name: Solaris Logistics
accounts.notes: HORIZON GA slipped to Aug 31. Tom Okafor notified Apr 10 of schedule change by Jennifer Wu. Tom confirmed Palantir evaluation is now active. Win probability declining. Account at serious risk if no firm Aug commitment given by May 1.

accounts.name: Nuvera Insurance
accounts.notes: Pilot continuing. Rajiv Patel engaged weekly with Marcus Chen. SOC 2 mandate issued Mar 25 — Rajiv aware NovaGrid is progressing. SSO close to live. Positive trajectory. CDO board pressure easing slightly with visible SOC 2 momentum.

accounts.name: VantagePoint Analytics
accounts.notes: SPARK architecture review completed Mar 24. Elena briefed on M2 slip to Aug 11. She acknowledged the delay and asked for a committed roadmap by Jun 1. Contract runs Aug — renewal at risk if v2 features not delivered or roadmap not credible.

accounts.name: Kestrel Media Group
accounts.notes: HORIZON GA slipped to Aug 31. Nina Ross notified Luca Apr 9. Luca responded: budget cycle closes Jul 31 — if mobile not GA by then, they cannot commit 2026 spend. Deal at serious risk. Nina escalated to CRO Apr 11. Emergency call scheduled Apr 15 to explore options.

accounts.name: Brightpath Education
accounts.notes: Python SDK v2 at 92% — on track for Apr 30 GA. SSO (Azure AD) at 88% — Brightpath confirmed this meets their requirement. Best timeline deal in portfolio. Close expected May 1.

opportunities.name: Meridian Financial Group — Enterprise NovaAI

programDependencies.requirement: Enterprise SSO (Okta) live in sandbox by Apr 2026
programDependencies.update: SSO sandbox demo completed Apr 2. Okta integration confirmed working.
Mandate driving progress. 48 controls complete. Evidence package needed by May 1 — tight.

opportunities.probabilityChange: unchanged at 65% — SSO progress positive but SOC 2 May deadline remains the gating risk.
opportunities.riskNote: 90-day legal clause voids if SOC2 evidence not demonstrable by May 1. Fatima Al-Hassan must confirm evidence package format with Deloitte by Apr 25.

opportunities.name: Apex Health Systems — Enterprise Platform

programDependencies.requirement: SOC 2 Type II (or in-progress) + HIPAA controls documented
programDependencies.update: HIPAA documentation in progress. SOC 2 mandate visible to Marcus Webb.

programDependencies.requirement: SSO working in sandbox by Apr 2 demo
programDependencies.update: Apr 2 demo succeeded. Marcus Webb greenlit POC.

opportunities.probabilityChange: +10 from 55% to 65%. Stage advanced from Technical Evaluation to Proof of Concept. Apr 2 demo was the gate.
opportunities.riskNote: Healthcare deals are all-or-nothing on compliance. SOC 2 Type II required before contract signature — must be certified by Aug.

opportunities.name: Thornbridge Capital — Renewal + Expansion

programDependencies.requirement: v1 API support through Jun 30 + migration tooling ready
programDependencies.update: MERIDIAN M1 completed Apr 3. Migration tooling (M4) completing Apr 18. Sophie confirmed tooling is sufficient — no dedicated support needed.

opportunities.probabilityChange: +4 from 78% to 82%. MERIDIAN M1 completion removed primary renewal risk.
opportunities.riskNote: Low risk. Main watch item: ensure v1 EoL announcement communication is managed carefully with Thornbridge.

opportunities.name: Solaris Logistics — Enterprise + Mobile

programDependencies.update: GA slipped to Aug 31. Tom Okafor notified. Palantir evaluation active.
SSO close. Audit logging slipped to May 21.

opportunities.probabilityChange: -25 from 60% to 35%. HORIZON slip triggered Palantir evaluation. Close date moved from Aug 1 to Sep 1.
opportunities.riskNote: Emergency: Tom Okafor gave Jennifer Wu 30 days to commit to Aug GA or he proceeds with Palantir. CRO escalation required.

opportunities.name: Nuvera Insurance — Enterprise NovaAI

programDependencies.update: Mandate visible. 48 controls complete. Trajectory improving. Rajiv aware.

programDependencies.requirement: Enterprise SSO + audit logging by Jun 2026
programDependencies.update: SSO close. Audit logging M4 slipped to May 21 — still Jun-ready.

opportunities.probabilityChange: unchanged at 70%. Pilot progressing positively. SOC 2 momentum visible to CDO.
opportunities.riskNote: Active champion. Maintain pilot momentum. Do not let audit logging slip push past Jun — CDO has Q3 board deadline.

opportunities.name: VantagePoint Analytics — Renewal + SPARK

programDependencies.requirement: v2 capabilities (multi-modal, visual workflow) by Aug 2026
programDependencies.update: M2 slipped to Aug 11. Multi-modal (M5) not started. Visual workflow (M3) not started. Aug delivery of these features is unlikely.

opportunities.probabilityChange: -10 from 50% to 40%. SPARK M2 slip to Aug 11 makes Aug feature delivery implausible. Elena briefed — requested committed roadmap by Jun 1.
opportunities.riskNote: Daniel Rios to prepare SPARK roadmap commitment doc by Jun 1 or VantagePoint will not renew. This is a win/lose on roadmap credibility.

opportunities.name: Kestrel Media Group — Mobile First

programDependencies.update: GA slipped to Aug 31. Luca Ferraro confirmed budget cycle closes Jul 31. Emergency call Apr 15.

opportunities.probabilityChange: -30 from 72% to 42%. HORIZON GA slip to Aug 31 directly conflicts with Kestrel budget cycle close date.
opportunities.riskNote: Emergency: CRO engaged. Apr 15 call. Options: (1) negotiate partial delivery (dashboard viewer + alerts, no push notifications) for Jul soft launch; (2) accept deal slips to 2027. Option 1 requires Priya Kaur to identify minimum viable mobile scope.

opportunities.name: Brightpath Education — Platform

programDependencies.requirement: Python SDK v2 GA by Apr 2026
programDependencies.update: Python SDK at 92%. GA on track for Apr 30.
SSO at 88%. Azure AD confirmed working in sandbox.

opportunities.probabilityChange: +8 from 68% to 76%. Both dependencies progressing on plan. Aaron Liu has confirmed technical evaluation positive.
opportunities.riskNote: Best timeline alignment deal. Priority: confirm Apr 30 SDK GA date with Aaron before May 1 close.

ifSOC2Slips.note: SOC2 slip past May evidence deadline voids Meridian Financial (90-day clause) and stalls Apex Health and Nuvera. SOC2 mandate improving trajectory but May deadline remains tight.

ifHorizonSlips.note: HORIZON GA confirmed Aug 31. Kestrel budget cycle closes Jul 31 — deal at serious risk ($1.6M). Solaris evaluating Palantir — win rate dropped from 60% to 35% ($2.4M at heightened risk). Total HORIZON exposure: ~$2.5M likely at risk, $1.5M at elevated risk.

ifAtlasSlips.note: SSO (M3) close to complete — reduces this risk. Audit logging (M4) slipped 3 weeks — watch for Jun customer commitments.

ifSparkSlips.note: VantagePoint renewal at risk. SPARK M2 slip to Aug 11 makes Aug v2 feature delivery implausible. Roadmap credibility doc required by Jun 1.
